name: Cinder
description: Cinder — trust & safety operations platform and API built by ex-Meta/Palantir for content review workflows.

seo.title: Cinder — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Cinder: Cinder — trust & safety operations platform and API built by ex-Meta/Palantir for content review workflows.

when_to_use: Building scalable trust & safety workflows with a moderation OS
Routing content decisions through configurable AI + human queues
Auditing and appealing moderation decisions with full trace logs
Managing cross-team moderation operations from a unified platform

pros: Built by ex-Meta and Palantir T&S operators
Case management plus API, not just scoring
Strong audit trail and policy workflow tooling
Well-suited to DSA and regulatory reporting
cons: Overkill if you don't have a dedicated T&S team
review.verdict: Best-in-class ops platform for serious T&S teams, but heavy for startups without dedicated reviewers.
review.best_for: Platforms with in-house T&S teams needing case management, reviewer UI, and audit trails.
review.not_for: Small teams that just want an API to score toxicity and move on.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
